memoryArtifacts.description:
Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick. Bruce towards Barons Bruce of 
Clackmannan. Blazon: Welf rampant lion azure on canton argent on chief gules, saltire gules all on shield Or; crest: Welf or Gruffyd passant lion azure.
Roberd De Bruce. Blazon: mullet argent on chief gules, saltire gules all on shield Or.

popularStory.headline: lineage
popularStory.description:
Thomas Bruce married Marjorie Charteris.
In 1334 he organised a rising against English rule, along with Robert II, 7th High Steward. As a reward, he was granted the demesnes of Clackmannan.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway於1280年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾卡里克時，他的父親Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale37歲，母親Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick26歲。他於1310年之前與Isabella de Strathbogie在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1318年10月14日在愛爾蘭庫迪 盧斯登達爾可享年38歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 盧斯巴利馬斯坎藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway于1280年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾卡里克时，他的父亲Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale37岁，母亲Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick26岁。他于1310年之前与Isabella de Strathbogie在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1318年10月14日在爱尔兰庫迪 盧斯登達爾可享年38岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 盧斯巴利馬斯坎藍。

nameMeanings.name: Bruce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from a place in Normandy, probably from Brix (La Manche).

History: The son of the Domesday baron, a friend of David I of Scotland, was granted by him the Lordship of Annandale in 1124, and his second son Robert became the founder of the Scottish house of Bruce. — This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with its original form Brousse in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Brousse
meanings: French: topographic name for someone living in a scrubby area, from Old French bro(u)ce ‘thicket, brushwood’ (from Late Latin bruscia), or a habitational name from any of several places in France named Brousse. Compare Bruce and Brusse .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered form Bruce) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Brewis
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Briouze in Orne.
(Northumberland and Durham): topographic name or nickname from Middle English breuhous ‘brewery’ (literally ‘brew house’).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway was born in 1280, in Carrick, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, was 37 and his mother, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, was 26. He married Isabella de Strathbogie before 1310, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 14 October 1318, in Dundalk, County Louth, Ireland, at the age of 38, and was buried in Ballymascanlan, County Louth, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway est né en 1280, à Carrick, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de Strathbogie avant 1310, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 14 octobre 1318, à Dundalk, County Louth, Irlande, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Ballymascanlan, County Louth, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway 1280 in Carrick, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale 37 und seine Mutter Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick 26. Er hat vor 1310 in Schottland, United Kingdom Isabella de Strathbogie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 14. Oktober 1318 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Dundalk, County Louth, Irland und wurde in Ballymascanlan, County Louth, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway è nato il nel 1280 nel Carrick, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Isabella de Strathbogie prima del 1310, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 14 ottobre 1318, nel Dundalk, County Louth, Irlanda, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Ballymascanlan, County Louth, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Gallowayが1280年にスコットランドアルグイルカーリックで生まれた時，父Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandaleは37歳，母Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrickは26歳であった。1310年以前にイギリススコットランドでIsabella de Strathbogieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1318年10月14日にアイルランドコウントイ ロウスダンダルクで38歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ロウスボーリマスカンランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway(이)가 1280년 스컷랜드 아그이 카릭에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1310년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Isabella de Strathbogie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1318년 10월 14일 아일랜드 카운티 루스 던다크에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 루스 바림아스캔런에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway nasceu em 1280, em Carrick, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Strathbogie antes 1310, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 14 de outubro de 1318, em Dundalk, County Louth, Irlanda, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Ballymascanlan, County Louth, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway родился в 1280 г. в местности каррикк, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Strathbogie перед 1310 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 14 октября 1318 г. в местности дундалк, коунти лоут, Ирландия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности баллимасканлан, коунти лоут, Ирландия.

sm.from 1313 to 1318: mai le 1313 e o'o I le 1318

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Bruce Earl of Carrick, High King of Ireland, Lord of Galloway nació en 1280, en Carrick, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Isabella de Strathbogie antes de 1310, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 14 de octubre de 1318, en Dundalk, County Louth, Irlanda, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Ballymascanlan, County Louth, Irlanda.
